violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -The Veggie slicer is fastened to a white cutting board. The cutting board is beginning to show signs of discoloration and should be replaced.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Lined single-use baskets are sitting upright under a dusty computer monitor. Advise storing these inverted to protect from contamination.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -The order monitors and metal brackets are above food baskets and dusty. They should be wiped down and cleaned more frequently.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -The bracket for mop handles is broken and has been pulled out from the wall in the mop area. Both mops are being stored in the bucket unable to air dry.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. The buckets in the ice cream machine area did not test for the proper concentration of sanitizer. These need to be changed.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The shelves above the slushie and ice cream machine need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. White cardboard cake bases at the cake station were not inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walls above the slushie machine needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
